body.title: CLOSED: Write three-coding-paths + CC-minion-last rule into palace
body.result: Palace node theigors/rules/cc-minion written: three coding paths + CC-minion-last rule + Igor-coding-last rule
body.description:
The three-coding-paths strategy (CC foreground / CC minion / Igor minion) and the Igor-coding-last rule need to be durable in Igor's palace, not just in CC's auto-memory. Write a palace node at theigors/rules/cc-minion. Decision D-shared-coding-subagent-2026-05-05.

**Affected files:** palace node theigors/rules/cc-minion (via mcp__igor__db_dispatch or psql INSERT)
**Design rules:** docs-live-in-code (palace is the canonical home for workflow rules)
**Scope boundary:** IN: palace node with three-coding-paths rule, Igor-coding-last rule, CC minion = Agent(isolation:worktree) for mechanical code edits. OUT: Igor-side subagent invocation (T-coding-subagent-igor-path).
**Test plan:** mcp__igor__memory_get(path='theigors/rules/cc-minion') returns the rule content.
**Pass condition:** Rule readable from palace via memory_get; context-load can surface it.
